trellis_version.description: Optional. Semver of the canonical core-rules this clone is pinned to. Read by scripts/upgrade.sh.

presets.description: Optional. List of preset rule-layers to load on top of the parent rules. Each entry must match a file under core-rules/presets/<name>.md. Symlinks land at <project>/.claude/rules/preset-<name>.md and <project>/.agents/rules/preset-<name>.md (under Codex). Order is preserved — later entries compose on top of earlier ones.

approved_mcps.description: Optional. Allowlist of MCP server names sanctioned for use across registered projects. Today this is documentation only — projects MAY connect MCPs not listed here. A future audit (mcp-drift) is reserved to warn when a project's .mcp.json references an unapproved server. Names match the server name as exposed to the harness (e.g., the prefix before '__' in mcp__<server>__<tool>). Examples: 'scheduled-tasks' (Trellis audits), 'computer-use', 'claude-in-chrome', 'Vercel', 'Cloudflare', 'obsidian'.

scope.description: 'fleet' = enabled across all registered projects; 'per-project' = only where the project explicitly opts in.
